description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical container of Camphor Fresh foot powder, primarily white with purple and green accents. The front features the brand name, a stylized leaf, and a large purple footprint graphic, along with product claims in Spanish such as 'Protege, Refresca, Suaviza.' The back displays detailed ingredient information, usage instructions, and safety warnings, all in Spanish, as well as a circular security seal graphic. The container appears to be made of lightweight plastic with a smooth, semi-glossy finish and a flat, screw-on cap at the top. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on foot care and freshness. The packaging is typical for personal care powders and is likely to be found in pharmacies, convenience stores, or urban street markets.
description: A tall, white cylindrical Camphor Fresh foot powder container with purple and green graphics, featuring a screw-on cap and detailed product labeling in Spanish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Camphor Fresh branding, purple footprint graphic, and main product claims in Spanish.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying ingredient list, safety warnings, and a circular security seal graphic.
description_view_2: Side view with partial branding, product information, and a glimpse of the security seal graphic.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting additional product details, usage instructions, and certification logos.
